title: Implement Campaign Management UI
description: Create the frontend views for listing a user's campaigns, creating a new campaign, and viewing the main campaign dashboard. This covers the UI for FR-004.
ai_instructions: Create a 'CampaignListView' to show all of the logged-in user's campaigns. Create a 'NewCampaignView' with a form to hit the campaign creation endpoint. Create a 'CampaignDashboardView' which will be the main hub for viewing a campaign's timeline and assets. Implement client-side routing between these views.
execution_steps: Create a 'campaignService.ts' to handle API calls for fetching and creating campaigns.
Implement the UI forms and lists.
Upon successful campaign creation, programmatically navigate the user to the new campaign's dashboard, satisfying FR-004.
Add the necessary routes to the application's router.
definition_of_done: A logged-in user can see a list of their campaigns.
A user can create a new campaign using a form.
After creating a campaign, the user is automatically redirected to that campaign's dashboard page.
The basic dashboard view is implemented.
